description: AI helps identify popular repositories, dependency graphs, maintainer activity, and high-impact packages.
A package or repo appears similar to a trusted OSS project, making review harder.
A small version update appears harmless, but metadata changes introduce suspicious behavior.
A postinstall/preinstall script or helper file appears in the package manifest.
Developers or pipelines pull the dependency automatically.
If not detected, the dependency may affect many downstream builds and environments.
SBOM, SCA, signatures, lock files, provenance checks, and private registries stop the compromise.
